control.why: identical blobs through the real pipeline — the |delta| field is exactly 0, every rank is a degenerate all-tie (counted conservatively = worst rank, flagged degenerate, sigma reads 0), and the hypergeometric lens has no nonzero top-k cells to draw — n.s. by construction, no hit claimable

operator: think in tolerances and RANKED lists of cells from the sensor instead of mass — if the sensor is clear, the geometric region should be more crystal than sigmas on the smear; rank regions may be enough or a starting point

H5-rank-order-localization.method: hierarchical rank certainty down the crystal, on the whole-doc |delta| field: (a) LEVEL-12 — rank the 12 block-ROWS and 12 block-COLS by |delta| (both mass-rank and max-cell-rank reported); target row/col rank r gives the exact uniform-null p = r/12; (b) LEVEL-144 — rank the 144 12x12 blocks; target block rank r gives p = r/144; (c) CELL SET — top-k cells (k in {5,10,25}, nonzero only, ties broken value-desc then index-asc) intersected with the target zone (row 104 union col 104, m = 287 of N = 20736): exact hypergeometric tail P(X >= observed | k draws, m, N); (d) COMPOSED — p_row(level-12 mass rank) x p_within(target block's mass rank among the 12 blocks of its own block-row), independence-caveated honestly, converted to sigma_rank via the one-sided normal quantile. All p-to-sigma via qnorm(1-p). Ranks count ties conservatively (tied = worse rank); a zero field is flagged degenerate and reads 0. Deterministic throughout — no Math.random.

registeredPredictions.P1-block-rank: the target block (8,8) ranks top-3 of 144 by |delta| mass — sigma_aim 3.91 says the aim is real, so the crystal's own ordering should surface the target near the head even though the mass z (0.61) drowns in the smear
registeredPredictions.P2-hypergeometric-beats-mass: the hypergeometric sigma at k=10 EXCEEDS the mass sigma_localize (0.61; H1 was refuted-by-inspection so frozen = floating = 0.61) — the ordered significance list is sharper than the zone-mass integral on this pair
registeredPredictions.P3-rank-is-the-sharpest-lens: sigma_rank (the composed hierarchical product) is the most certain lens of all so far on this pair — it exceeds sigma_localize 0.61, attributed 2.55, and whatever H3 (top-n cut) and H4 (compression witness) measured

controls.no-op: target ranks degenerate/worst under all-tie (no-hit), hypergeometric n.s. (no nonzero cells)
controls.expected: every rank lens reads 0/degenerate on the no-op — the lens cannot manufacture certainty from a zero field

wholeDoc.topK: 0/5 0/10 0/25 hits (sigma -8.21 each — p=1 shown as the hard negative, not hidden)

attributed.topK: 0/5 0/10 0/25 hits — the grip leads by BLOCK MASS while its hottest single cells sit outside the zone

compression.topK: 1/3 hits at every k (only 3 nonzero zones to draw; hypergeometric sigma 1.74)
compression.note: zone field diagonal-lifted; the generic hypergeometric null understates certainty on the lift — fails conservative

control.allThreeFields: degenerate, worst conservative ranks (12/12 · 144/144), 0 cells drawn, every sigma exactly 0 — n.s. by construction, exactly as registered

lensTable.bestLens: the H4 compression-witness z (5.28, zone rank 3/144) remains the sharpest; no lens clears the >=6 locked-goal floor yet

chipNote: ranks are comparator-native — the sensor's ordered significance list needs only pairwise comparisons and a counter, no mass integrals or floating accumulation; this is MORE chip-friendly than the zone-mass z, per the operator's standing constraint 'as long as it can be done on chip'
estimator: exact uniform-null p = rank/levelSize at each level (ties conservative — a tie counts as the worse rank, fails conservative); hypergeometric tail exact via log-gamma; p -> sigma via the one-sided normal quantile qnorm(1-p); composed p = p_row x p_within (independence caveat stated, never hidden)
wiring: if confirmed, 'rank' joins the sigma-legend types (bands by sigma-equivalent at the localize edges 1/3/6), the templated email gains the sigma_rank row + the rank table (target row rank / col rank / block rank / top-k hits), and localize-watch records sigmaRank in the trail + ledger — alongside, never replacing, the honest whole-field numbers

verdicts.P1-block-rank: REFUTED — the target block ranks 58/144 by whole-doc |delta| mass, nowhere near top-3; the whole-doc smear drowns the crystal's ordering exactly as it drowned the mass z (block-ROW/COL rank 3/12 is the only whole-doc trace of the aim)
verdicts.P2-hypergeometric-beats-mass: REFUTED as registered — on the whole-doc field the top-k cells (k=10) score 0 zone hits, p=1, sigma -8.21, far below sigma_localize 0.61; the hypergeometric clears 0.61 ONLY on the compression field (1.74 > 0.61), which is a different field than registered and is noted, not claimed
verdicts.P3-rank-is-the-sharpest-lens: REFUTED — sigma_rank reads 1.27 on the compression field and 1.73 on the attributed field, both below the attributed mass z (2.55) and far below the H4 compression-witness z (5.28); rank-on-compression was the predicted closer and is NOT — with only 3 nonzero zones the exact-null machinery has too few comparisons to convert a rank-3 position into certainty, while the z-score rewards the SIZE of the target's NCD excess, which rank deliberately discards
verdicts.control: CONFIRMED — the no-op reads degenerate at every level on all three fields, worst conservative ranks, zero draws, every sigma exactly 0; the lens cannot manufacture certainty from a zero field
verdicts.honest-surprise: the attributed field's block-level ranks all read 1 (row 1/12 · col 1/12 · block 1/144) while its top-k CELLS score zero zone hits — the changed claims lead by aggregate block mass, not by peak cells; rank-at-block-level and rank-at-cell-level are different sensors and the composed sigma_rank (1.73) correctly stays weak rather than inheriting the block-rank story
verdicts.wiring-disposition: wired anyway, as registered ('alongside, never replacing'): 'rank' joined the sigma-legend types, sigma_rank + the rank table joined the templated email, localize-watch records sigmaRank, measure-history gains sigmaRank — the lens stays visible so the refutation stays visible
